title: Marketing Data & Operations Intern (6 Months)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

  • At Sekuro, we are the trusted cybersecurity partner for a diverse range of organisations, from multinational corporations to small and medium-sized enterprises. Our comprehensive suite of services supports clients throughout their entire cybersecurity lifecycle, anchored by our five core business pillars: Governance, Risk and Compliance (GRC), Offensive Security (RED), Technologies Platform & Engineering (TPE), Managed Security Services (MSS), and Team Augmentation (TAM).

Job Summary

We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Intern to optimize our marketing engine by managing inbound leads, maintaining database integrity, and supporting daily marketing operations. This role offers a valuable opportunity to develop skills in Marketing Analytics, RevOps, or Business Intelligence.

Responsibilities

  • Review, categorize, and clean incoming and historical marketing leads to ensure accurate routing to appropriate sales channels
  • Conduct regular audits of CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce) to remove duplicates, correct formatting, and update missing contact information
  • Develop dashboards or spreadsheets that track lead conversion rates and campaign performance to inform marketing strategies
  • Perform ad-hoc market research on target industries and competitors to enhance lead data quality and relevance
  • Provide administrative support including preparing marketing documentation, taking meeting notes, and assisting with scheduling
  • Collaborate with supervisors to support special projects or initiatives that contribute to Sekuro’s marketing objectives and business growth

Required competencies and certifications

  • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets, including data cleaning, complex formulas, and data modeling
  • Familiarity with CRM architectures such as Salesforce, HubSpot, or Dynamics 365, and understanding of the lead-to-revenue lifecycle
  • Exceptional organizational skills to manage high-volume administrative tasks with precision and accuracy
  • Strong analytical skills to identify data trends and deliver actionable insights to the marketing team
  • Effective written and verbal communication skills with the ability to handle sensitive internal data discreetly

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Business Analytics, Marketing Research, Statistics, or a related quantitative field

Other Information

  • Location: Singapore

postedCompany.description:
Privasec is a leading independent provider of Cyber Security services. We operate across multiple lines of businesses including GRC, RED, Technology Platform Engineering, and Managed Security Services.

  • Privasec GRC are the specialists in Governance, Risk and Compliance which covers PCI DSS, ISO27001, ISO27017, ISO27018, SWIFT and other key regulations required to operate in today’s market.
  • Privasec RED are leaders in Penetration Testing, Drone Security, Red Team Attack simulations, SCADA & ICS Security, Physical Intrusions, Theft simulations, Open Source Intelligence Gathering (OSINT), Social Engineering, and Phishing. We are CREST certified.

We believe in partnering with our customers and building long-lasting relationships, based on trust, integrity and care. We hold numerous accreditations and are ISO27001:2013 certified.

Visit www.privasec.com for more information.
postedCompany.name: SEKURO OPERATIONS PTE. LTD.
